title: Acinodendron argyrophyllum
taxonomy: Acinodendron argyrophyllum is a member of the family Melastomataceae. This plant is native to South America and is classified within the genus Acinodendron. Acinodendron argyrophyllum is a shrub or small tree with showy flowers. It belongs to the order Myrtales and is a part of the larger clade of flowering plants. The species is further classified under the kingdom Plantae.
